title: #sre-alerts
content: Just pushed v2.3 hotfix to production. Let me know if database pool usage looks stable. There were reports of transaction locks on the old release.
author: dev-lead

title: #sre-alerts
content: Stripe API status dashboard is showing red - Stripe API is down again globally for some merchant gateways. Are we seeing timeouts?
author: sre-lead

title: #security-ops
content: Our upstream JWKS identity provider (auth-token-service) changed its network egress policy. We might need to adjust firewalls if authentication starts throwing handshake errors.
author: sec-engineer
